allow: Bash(npx vercel env add SPOONACULAR_API_KEY production)
Bash(npx vercel env rm SPOONACULAR_API_KEY production --yes)
Bash(npx vercel env rm Spoonacular production --yes)
Bash(npx vercel env rm Spoonacular preview --yes)
Bash(npx vercel env rm Spoonacular development --yes)

Bash(git add .gitignore api/recipes.js index.html package.json package-lock.json src/App.jsx src/api/recipes.js src/components/FilterBar.jsx src/components/RecipeCard.jsx src/components/RecipeDetail.jsx src/components/RecipeList.jsx src/index.css tailwind.config.cjs vercel.json vite.config.js src/components/AboutPage.jsx src/components/Footer.jsx src/components/Logo.jsx server.dev.mjs screenshot.mjs "Brand_assets/Forside.png" "Brand_assets/Forside_Billede.jpg" "Brand_assets/Logo.svg" "Brand_assets/Logo_Mavro.svg" "Brand_assets/Om Mavro.png" "Brand_assets/Opskrift.png" public/)
